description.en: The first competitive FTC robot built by VIS Mars. Engineered for the DECODE season, it features autonomous navigation, computer vision pixel alignment, and a secure hanging mechanism. Through multiple iterations, it delivered outstanding performances at the Taiwan Selection and Hong Kong Championship.
description.zh: VIS Mars 的第一台 FTC 競賽機器人。為 DECODE 賽季設計，具備自動導航、像素辨識與掛鉤攀爬功能。經過多次迭代改進，在台灣選拔賽與香港錦標賽中表現出色。

description.en: The team's first prototype robot, built during the pre-season to learn basic mechanical principles and test coding workflows. This robot helped the team establish solid foundations in FTC hardware systems and Java programming.
description.zh: 團隊的第一台練習機器人，用於學習基本的機器人控制和簡單機構測試。這台機器人幫助團隊成員熟悉 FTC 系統和程式開發流程。
